Donate
About Programs Events News Contact
Donate Now
Make an Impact

Give Creativity a Chance

Your gift powers the programs, people, and communities at the heart of America's creative economy. NACED is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit — your donation is fully tax-deductible.

Your Gift in Action

See exactly how your contribution makes a difference at every level.

$25
Starter Kit

Covers the cost of business materials for one creative entrepreneur in our accelerator program.

$100
Workshop Seat

Sponsors one artist's attendance at a full-day skills workshop, including meals and materials.

$500
Micro-Grant

Funds a seed micro-grant for a community creative placemaking project in an underserved neighborhood.

$1,000
Community Leader

Supports a full year of NACED membership and resources for one creative entrepreneur.

$5,000
Program Champion

Co-funds a community cohort of the Accelerator program — 10 artists, 12 weeks, life-changing results.

Custom
Your Amount

Every dollar matters. Give whatever amount feels right for you.

Make a Donation

Secure, online giving powered by Zeffy — 100% of your donation reaches NACED.

💛

Donation Form Coming Soon

To enable online giving, add your Zeffy donation page URL to the Site Settings in the Sanity Studio. The donation form will appear here automatically.

Donate by Email Other Ways to Give

Other Ways to Give

💼

Corporate Partnership

Align your brand with creative economic development. Corporate partners receive recognition, impact reports, and engagement opportunities.

Inquire about partnerships →
📜

Planned Giving

Leave a legacy that supports creative economies for generations. Include NACED in your estate plan and we'll honor your vision.

Learn about planned giving →
🎁

Donate by Mail

Make checks payable to NACED and mail to: 123 Creative Commons Dr, Suite 200, Chicago, IL 60601.

EIN: 00-0000000

🔄

Recurring Giving

Monthly donors are the backbone of our work. A consistent gift — even $10/month — provides the reliable funding we need to plan ahead.

Set up a recurring gift →

NACED is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the fullest extent permitted by law. Our EIN is 00-0000000. We are committed to full financial transparency — view our annual reports and 990s.

N
NACED

National Association for Creative Economic Development — advancing communities through the power of creativity, culture, and innovation.
